summary: Iteration 327: Encyclopedia ConceptCard expansion fix + SovereignViewport immersive backgrounds verification. ALL 26 TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) Encyclopedia page loads with 12 tradition cards, (2) Clicking Hinduism opens detail view with 'Hinduism & Vedic Wisdom' title, (3) Core Teachings section shows concept cards: Brahman & Atman, Dharma, Karma & Samsara, (4) Concept cards EXPAND on click with description and 'Explore deeper' button, (5) Chevron rotates on expand, (6) Enter VR Mode button visible, (7) Immersive backgrounds on Yoga, Oracle, Numerology, Meditation, Crystals modules with SovereignViewport wrapper.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Encyclopedia ConceptCard fix verified. Key features: (1) ConceptCard component in Encyclopedia.js with useState for expanded state, (2) onClick toggles expansion, (3) 'Explore deeper' button calls POST /api/encyclopedia/explore, (4) data-testid format: concept-{name-lowercase-hyphenated}, explore-{name-lowercase-hyphenated}, (5) Chevron rotates 90deg on expand. SovereignViewport immersive backgrounds on 5 modules verified. Login route is /auth.
